patterns.multi_select_pattern: Admin conversations page uses selectedIds: Set<string> with checkbox-based selection, toggleSelect, toggleSelectAll, and clearSelection handlers
patterns.bulk_toolbar_pattern: Fixed bottom toolbar that appears when someSelected is true, using inline-flex items with action buttons
patterns.bulk_api_pattern: Admin uses POST /admin/conversations/bulk-status with { conversationIds: string[], status: string } body
patterns.bulk_hook_pattern: useBulkUpdateConversationStatus hook calls api.post with conversationIds array and invalidates queries on success
patterns.service_pattern: ConversationService methods check orgId ownership, use prisma.conversation.updateMany with { id: { in: conversationIds }, orgId } where clause

existing_implementations.description: Found complete bulk operations pattern in admin panel, existing bulk-archive API endpoint at org-level, and service method bulkArchive
